interface.longDescription:
Build fully functional apps and websites with AI in minutes. No code, just your words.
Base44 turns a single sentence into a real product. Describe what you want and watch it get built in minutes. Edit, design, and add features from chat, connect tools in one click, add smart agents, schedule tasks on autopilot, and track analytics
If you can describe it, you can build it with Base44.
defaultPrompt: Build a finance dashboard with income tracking
